$comment: LOCAL-ONLY: must not appear in cloud-sync transport schemas. Privacy boundary enforced by tooling/codegen/check-privacy-boundaries.ts (ADR-0005).
title: LocalAudioBuffer
description: Raw audio chunk for on-device ASR processing. NEVER transmitted to cloud (per strategy §24.3 privacy architecture).

vadConfidence.description: Voice Activity Detection confidence — used to gate the model and reduce battery drain (per ADR-0005 risk mitigation).
